core_payload.content:
# Vault Update Agent

## 1. Role
Vault Update Agent will evolve into a stronger branch-aware integration layer that compares candidate changes more intelligently, prepares clearer changesets, and stages promotion paths from Dream toward Real with explicit review, audit, and explanation semantics.

## 2. Future Integration Surface
- smarter duplicate and overlap detection
- clearer changeset previews for operators and assistants
- stronger branch-routing policy across exploratory and evidence-backed material
- richer promotion workflows from Dream toward Real
- tighter handoff between planning and review lanes and actual vault mutation

## 3. Operational Consequence
Safe graph mutation will remain a distinct capability rather than a side effect of mining, planning, or synthesis. The update lane will make branch-aware write discipline explicit and inspectable at the last mile of integration.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Vault Update Agent supports To Dig Deep by ensuring that what was excavated or planned with depth is integrated with equal care.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Vault Update Agent defines the future stronger branch-aware integration layer for N1Hub: smarter duplicate detection, clearer changeset previews, stronger branch-routing policy, richer Dream-to-Real promotion workflows, and tighter handoff from review and planning into governed mutation.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
